name: HTS_SCHEDULES_
description: Table holding the schedule information of schedule units.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_ID
columns.Comments: PrimaryKey.System generated unique identifier for a schedule

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Schedule UnitId  for which schedule is created.

columns.Name: SCHED_GEN_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: ScheduleGenerationProfileId used for creating the schedule

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start Date of a Schedule Period.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: End Date of a Schedule Period

columns.Name: OPEN_DATE
columns.Comments: Date from which the manager can access the Schedule for updates.

columns.Name: PUBLISH_DUE_DATE
columns.Comments: Due Date for manager to publish the schedule.

columns.Name: PUBLISHED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which schedule is published

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status of the Schedule.

columns.Name: SELF_SCHEDULE_OPEN_DATE
columns.Comments: Date from which  workers can perform self-scheduling.

columns.Name: SELF_SCHEDULE_CLOSE_DATE
columns.Comments: Date until which workers can perform self-scheduling

columns.Name: SELF_SCHEDULE_ROTATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Rotation type used for self-scheduling.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Latest updated timestamp for the schedule

columns.Name: WORKLOAD_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Latest updated timestamp for the workload

columns.Name: PUBLISHED_BY
columns.Comments: Used to indicate the person's id who published the schedule

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: EnterpriseId

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comment that may be provided as information at creation or when updating the shift.

columns.Name: UNPUBLISHED_BY
columns.Comments: Identifier of the person who unpublished the schedule

columns.Name: UNPUBLISH_DATE
columns.Comments: Date and Time when the schedule was Unpublished

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
